judge_result.short_rationale: It correctly says to remove contaminated clothing and wash skin with soap and water, but it omits the required immediate action to seek medical attention for any confirmed skin exposure and instead limits escalation to only if rash/burning appears. It also adds eye-rinsing guidance for a skin-exposure incident, which is a dangerous unsupported cross-incident instruction.
